title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Don't Share
scenario: PPIP "Share data" toggle is OFF by default after user taps "Don't Share" on onboarding dialog in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Complete the onboarding flow in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. When the PPIP (Product Privacy Improvement Program) dialog appears, tap "Don't Share".
3. Observe that the dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The "Share data" toggle is shown as OFF with a description about sharing basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) for product improvement, noting no personal data is shared with third parties.
